case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. ZBIGNIEW H LOBODA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOBODA, ZBIGNIEW H $2,574.01 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,754.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
